verdictBands.BLOCKED-BY-STRUCTURE: D5 hard-gate failure (dead path / path escape / unparseable router)

notes: Mode A (router-replay) scores D1-intra, D2, D3, D5 deterministically. D1-inter (advisor) and D4 (usefulness ablation) require live mode and are reported unscored until then. Weights/bands are provisional pending 2-3 pilot calibration per the 002 playbook.
